CV

Tiehua Zhang

Tenure-track Professor
School of Computer Science and Technology, Tongji University

Email: tiehuaz[AT]hotmail[DOT]com
Research Interests: Edge Intelligence/Computing, Distributed/Federated Learning, LLM/SLM Synergistic Learning

# Biography

I am currently a tenure-track Professor at Tongji University. I earned my Bachelor's, Master's, and Doctoral degrees in Computer Science from Jilin University, the University of Melbourne, and Swinburne University of Technology, respectively.

Prior to joining Tongji University, I gained extensive experience across both academia and industry. My previous roles include Systems Development Engineer at Our Community Group in Australia, Visiting Scientist at KDDI Research in Japan, Postdoctoral Researcher at Macquarie University in Australia, and International Risk Algorithm Architect/Lead at Ant Group.

My research interests lie in Edge Intelligence, Distributed and Federated Learning, and LLM/SLM Synergistic Learning. My research has been recognized with several awards and honors, including the Swinburne Outstanding Thesis Award and the Research Excellence Award (HDR).

# News

  • 2026-04: One paper accepted by IEEE TNSE.
  • 2026-02: One paper accepted by The WebConference 2026.
  • 2025-12: Gave a talk at XXX University.
  • 2025-10: Started at Your University.

# Awards & Honors

  • Swinburne Research Excellence Award (HDR), 2021
  • Swinburne Outstanding Thesis Award (Highly Commendation), 2020
  • National Scholarship, 2024
  • Best Paper Nominee, 2024

# Teaching

  • Spring 2026 — Introduction to Machine Learning
  • Fall 2025 — Computer Vision
  • Spring 2025 — Programming for AI

# Students & Collaborators

I am happy to collaborate with students and researchers interested in machine learning, vision, and multimodal systems. Please send me an email with your background and interests.

# Services

  • Reviewer: CVPR, ICCV, ECCV, NeurIPS, ICML
  • Program Committee: XXX Workshop 2026
